Get started free
AI UI Quality Checker

An AI UI quality checker built for AI-generated interfaces

When you build with v0, Lovable, or Cursor, the output moves fast. AIDQA audits each generated screen for measurable quality issues — layout drift, hierarchy weakness, inconsistency, and accessibility risk — and tells you exactly what to fix before you ship.

Check my UI for free

No credit card required

  • Audits AI-generated UI for layout drift, hierarchy failures, and spacing inconsistency
  • Structured findings with evidence regions — not vague "something looks off" reports
  • Works on screenshots and live URLs — no codebase access, no CI setup required

What teams are saying

Up and running in two minutes

01

Paste a URL

Add any publicly accessible URL. No code changes, no browser plugins.

02

Approve a baseline

AIDQA captures a screenshot. Review it and click approve — that's your reference.

03

Get alerted on drift

AIDQA checks on your schedule. When pixels shift beyond your threshold, you get an alert with an AI explanation.

Stop guessing. Get objective design QA for your AI-generated UI.

Check my UI for free

No credit card required

AIDQA — Automated visual regression testing.
